headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 9, 2026**
article:
The Houston Astros dominated the Cincinnati Reds, securing a 10-0 victory behind Mike Burrows' strong pitching effort. The Colorado Rockies rallied past the Philadelphia Phillies 9-7, while the Oakland Athletics edged the Baltimore Orioles in a thrilling 4-3 victory. The Los Angeles Angels fell short in Toronto, suffering a 0-2 loss to the Blue Jays.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, impacting their team's availability. Tyler Glasnow has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to low back spasms. Jake Mangum, Cade Povich, Travis d'Arnaud, Cole Ragans, Jasson Domínguez, Luis Campusano, and Joe Musgrove have also been placed on the injured list with various injuries.

The Baltimore Orioles made a move to bolster their roster, acquiring RHP Enyel Garcia from the Philadelphia Phillies in exchange for cash. The Athletics traded RHP Tyler Ferguson to the Chicago Cubs, while the Tampa Bay Rays traded RHP Yoendrys Gómez to the Minnesota Twins for cash. The Philadelphia Phillies traded RHP Trevor Richards to the Chicago White Sox for cash.

top_news.title: **Astros Shut Out Reds 10-0**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros dominated the Cincinnati Reds, securing a 10-0 victory. Mike Burrows led the Astros' pitching effort, throwing 7.0 innings with 6 strikeouts and 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Rockies Rally Past Phillies 9-7**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies secured a thrilling 9-7 victory over the Philadelphia Phillies, with Hunter Goodman leading the offense and Chase Dollander pitching a strong 5.2 innings.

top_news.title: **Athletics Edge Orioles in Thrilling 4-3 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Oakland Athletics secured a narrow win over the Baltimore Orioles, with Jacob Lopez earning the win and Hogan Harris securing the save.

top_news.title: **Angels Fall Short in Toronto**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Angels suffered a 0-2 loss to the Toronto Blue Jays, with Kazuma Okamoto leading the team in batting with 1 hit, 1 RBI, and 3 at-bats. Dylan Cease earned the win for the Blue Jays, pitching 7.0 innings with 10 strikeouts, 0 earned runs, and 0 walks.

top_news.title: **Glasnow Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Los Angeles Dodgers right-hander Tyler Glasnow has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to low back spasms. The move was made on May 8, 2026.

top_news.title: **Orioles Acquire Enyel Garcia in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles have made a move to bolster their roster, acquiring RHP Enyel Garcia from the Philadelphia Phillies in exchange for cash.
